meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Ava 2.0
products.tagline: Your AI BDR that runs outbound sales autonomously
products.summaryZh: 你的AI业务拓展代表，自主执行外呼销售
products.descriptionZh: Ava 是一款AI业务拓展代表，可全自动运行您的整个对外拓展流程。她从2.5亿+专业人士中获取潜在客户，执行多渠道触达，并预约合格会议。全程自主运行。
products.description: Ava is an AI BDR that runs your entire outbound on autopilot. She sources leads from 250M+ professionals, runs multi-channel outreach, and books qualified meetings. Fully autonomously.

products.name: /monitor by Firecrawl
products.tagline: Notify your AI agent when the web changes
products.summaryZh: 当网页发生变化时通知您的AI代理
products.descriptionZh: /monitor 会在页面或网站发生变更时，通过 webhook 通知你的 agent。仅摄取页面上的变更内容，最多可减少 90% 的 LLM token 消耗。
products.description: /monitor notifies your agent via webhook the moment pages or sites change. Use up to 90% fewer LLM tokens by only ingesting what changes on a page.

products.name: Ava Studio
products.tagline: Your AI creative team for video ads
products.summaryZh: 你的AI视频广告创意团队
products.descriptionZh: Ava Studio 研究您的产品，提炼卖点与创意角度，随后生成50余个可编辑的短视频广告变体，适用于TikTok、Reels、Meta及您希望投放的任何平台。
products.description: Ava Studio researches your product, develops hooks and creative angles, then generates 50+ editable short-form ad variants ready for TikTok, Reels, Meta, and any platform you want to ship on.

products.name: Agent A by Ahrefs
products.tagline: The AI Marketing Agent Powered by Ahrefs Data
products.summaryZh: 由Ahrefs数据驱动的AI营销代理
products.descriptionZh: Agent A 登场——基于 Ahrefs 行业领先的 170T+ 索引页面数据集构建的 AI 代理。它能分析、构建并执行营销洞察，让你专注于策略。
products.description: Meet Agent A — the AI agent built on Ahrefs' industry-leading dataset of 170T+ indexed pages. Analyzes, builds, and acts on marketing insights so you can focus on strategy.

products.name: Firecoach AI
products.tagline: AI roleplays that turn reps into top performers
products.summaryZh: AI角色扮演，让销售代表成为顶尖人才
products.descriptionZh: FireCoach.ai 是复制销售方法论并规模化培训团队每位成员的最快方式——无需增加人力。基于你的销售手册构建定制化AI销售机器人，开展代表角色演练，获取评分反馈，并在丢单前识别培训缺口。
products.description: FireCoach.ai is the fastest way to clone your sales methodology and coach every rep on your team — at scale, without adding headcount. Build custom AI sales bots trained on your playbook, run rep roleplays, get scored feedback, and identify coaching gaps before they show up on a lost deal.

products.name: MCP Bridge by Appfactor
products.tagline: Connect any API to any AI agent
products.summaryZh: 将任意API连接到任意AI代理
products.descriptionZh: 将Point MCP Bridge指向任意REST、GraphQL、SOAP或gRPC API。它会自动生成包含类型化模式、认证、速率限制和响应处理的MCP工具定义。您的LLM代理通过一个标准接口调用企业API。
products.description: Point MCP Bridge at any REST, GraphQL, SOAP, or gRPC API. It auto-generates MCP tool definitions with typed schemas, auth, rate limiting, and response processing. Your LLM agents call enterprise APIs through one standard interface.

products.name: Integuru
products.tagline: Generate fast, reliable APIs for any platform. No browsers
products.summaryZh: 为任意平台生成快速、可靠的API。无需浏览器。
products.descriptionZh: Integuru 为任意平台生成快速、可靠的 API，无需浏览器或 RPA。API 调用约 3 秒内完成，成功率超过 99.9%。当前多数智能体使用浏览器自动化来控制缺乏官方 API 的 Web 应用，但这种方式缓慢且脆弱。Integuru 完全替代浏览器，直接连接后端。Integuru 覆盖身份验证和边界情况。集成具备自动修复、API 文档以及 24/7 待命维护团队。每个 API 在数分钟内端到端生成。
products.description: Integuru generates fast, reliable APIs for any platform, without browsers or RPA. API calls complete in ~3 seconds with 99.9%+ success. Most agents today use browser automation to control web apps that lack official APIs, but this is slow and brittle. Integuru replaces browsers entirely and connects directly with the backend. Integuru covers authentication and edge cases. Integrations get auto-healing, API docs, and a 24/7 on-call maintenance team. Each API is generated end-to-end in minutes.

products.name: Linear Diffs
products.tagline: A new way to review PRs, directly inside Linear
products.summaryZh: 在Linear中直接审查PR的新方式
products.descriptionZh: 推出 Linear Diffs，让代码审查成为 Linear 原生的快速流畅体验。现在，你可以从任何关联 PR 的问题中审查差异，借助智能体迭代后续更改，并直接从 Linear 发布代码。Linear 中的所有审查结果都会同步回 GitHub，确保审查工作的当前状态始终清晰可见。Linear Diffs 现已面向所有套餐开放。
products.description: Introducing Linear Diffs to make reviewing code a fast and fluid experience native to Linear. You can now review diffs from any issue with a PR, iterate on further changes with agents, and ship code from Linear. All reviews in Linear sync back to GitHub, so the current state of review work is always clear. Linear Diffs is available now on all plans.

products.name: Sinalytica
products.tagline: Travel back to 1998 and use Lovable on Windows 98
products.summaryZh: 回到1998年，在Windows 98上使用Lovable。
products.descriptionZh: Sina Rajaeeian — 软件工程师与机器学习工程师。从事人工智能/机器学习、网页与移动端开发以及量化金融领域。
products.description: Sina Rajaeeian — Software Engineer and ML engineer. Building across AI/ML, web & mobile, and quantitative finance.

products.name: Screen Ruler
products.tagline: The go-to ruler for designers and developers
products.summaryZh: 设计师和开发者的首选尺子
products.descriptionZh: 与浏览器开发者工具不同，Screen Ruler 专为设计工作流打造：可视化 flexbox/grid 拆解、带色标点的渐变检查、多元素伪状态模拟、CSS 转 Tailwind，以及包含性能、SEO 和社交预览的页面标签。
products.description: Unlike browser DevTools, Screen Ruler is built for design workflows: visual flexbox/grid breakdown, gradient inspection with color stops, multi-element pseudo-state simulation, CSS-to-Tailwind conversion, and a Page tab with Performance, SEO, and Social previews.

products.name: Basedash: Embedded Analytics
products.tagline: Give customers AI analytics inside your product.
products.summaryZh: 在您的产品中为客户提供AI分析功能。
products.descriptionZh: Basedash Embedding 将 Basedash 的全部能力嵌入你的产品中。通过一个 iframe 即可嵌入仪表盘，或嵌入整个应用，让客户无需离开你的产品就能与 AI 代理对话、构建自己的仪表盘并获取自动洞察。行级安全机制将每个客户限定在自己的数据范围内，自定义控制功能则能精确决定他们能看到哪些功能。配置只需一个 iframe 和一个 JWT。分析功能，就在你的产品内部。每个客户各有其数据范围。
products.description: Basedash Embedding puts the full power of Basedash inside your own product. Drop a dashboard in with one iframe, or embed the whole app so your customers can chat with the AI agent, build their own dashboards, and get automatic insights — without ever leaving you. Row-level security scopes every customer to their own data, and customization controls decide exactly which features they see. Setup is one iframe and a JWT. Analytics, inside your product. Scoped to every customer.

products.name: Hyper: Self-driving Company Brain
products.tagline: Turn your AI agents from interns to veterans
products.summaryZh: 将你的AI智能体从实习生升级为资深专家
products.descriptionZh: Hyper 是企业的“大脑”，它能学习你公司的一切信息（文档、Slack、邮件、日历等），然后接入你的 AI 技能、智能体和自动化流程，让它们从健忘的实习生变成能完成任务的老手。它能用你的语气起草邮件、阅读合同、分类工单，并为每次会议做好准备，因为它了解你公司每个人所知道的一切。欢迎到我们的网站试试看！
products.description: Hyper is the company brain that learns everything about your company (Docs, Slack, Email, Calendar, etc) then plugs into your AI skills & agents & automations so they go from forgetful interns into seasoned veterans that accomplish tasks. It helps them drafts emails in your voice, reads your contracts, triages your tickets, and preps you for every meeting, because it knows everything everyone at your company knows. Give it a spin from our website!

products.name: Notchy
products.tagline: Mac dynamic island with music, timers, clipboard, file drops
products.summaryZh: Mac 灵动岛，支持音乐、计时器、剪贴板、文件拖放
products.descriptionZh: Notchy 是一款免费的 macOS 原生刘海应用，能将 MacBook 的刘海区域变为流畅的灵动岛——支持音乐、计时器、剪贴板、文件拖放、Cluely 及 HUD 显示。
products.description: Notchy is the free, native macOS notch app that turns your MacBook notch into a fluid Dynamic Island — music, timers, clipboard, file drops, cluely, HUDs.

products.name: MoDev
products.tagline: The AI dev environment built for your phone.
products.summaryZh: 为你的手机打造的AI开发环境。
products.descriptionZh: 专为手机打造的AI开发环境。连接GitHub、Vercel、Supabase、Gmail、日历等更多服务。任意AI。任意API。然后通过对话交付。→ 从手机部署 → 读取仓库、提交代码、发起PR → 用自然语言查询数据库 → 通过聊天管理邮件和日历 → 开发计划自带密钥（BYOK）· Moonlight包含Claude。一条消息。真实执行。随时随地。独立构建。自筹资金。创始会员永久锁定今日价格——仅限前100名。
products.description: The AI dev environment built for your phone. Connect GitHub, Vercel, Supabase, Gmail, Calendar, and more. Any AI. Any API. Then chat to ship. → Deploy from your phone → Read repos, commit, open PRs → Query your database with natural language → Manage email and calendar by chat → BYOK on dev plans · Claude included on Moonlight One message. Real execution. From anywhere. Built solo. Bootstrapped. Founding members lock in today's price forever — first 100 only.

products.name: TrackNotch
products.tagline: LLM usage tracking that lives in your Mac's notch
products.summaryZh: LLM 使用追踪，就在你的 Mac 刘海屏里
products.descriptionZh: TrackNotch 是一款原生 macOS 应用，可在刘海区域直接显示 Claude、OpenAI、Cursor 和 Codex 的使用情况。上下文弧、预算追踪、速率限制，全部本地运行。无需代理，无遥测数据，所有信息均不离开你的设备。免费且开源。
products.description: TrackNotch is a native macOS app that shows Claude, OpenAI, Cursor, and Codex usage right in your notch. Context arc, budget tracking, rate limits and all local. No proxies, no telemetry, nothing leaves your machine. Free and open-source.

products.name: Clipline
products.tagline: AI Video Cutter for viral Shorts, Reels, TikTok in Telegram
products.summaryZh: Telegram 中用于制作病毒式短视频、Reels、TikTok 的 AI 视频剪辑工具
products.descriptionZh: Clipline 是一款基于 AI 的 Telegram 机器人，可在 90 秒内将任意长视频（YouTube 或本地文件）转化为简短、吸引人的片段。只需点击“分享 → Clipline”，无需复制粘贴。✅ 智能剪辑：采用 Gemini AI 技术，确保无断词问题。✅ 可自定义字幕 + 自有横幅水印。✅ 自动将字幕翻译为英文 🌍。✅ 文件 3 小时后自动删除，完全保护隐私。✅ 按需付费：“保留并退款”计费模式。适用于创作者、社交媒体营销、套利及剪辑频道。
products.description: Clipline is an AI-powered Telegram bot that turns any long video (YouTube, file) into short, engaging clips in 90 seconds. Just tap Share → Clipline — no copy‑paste. ✅ Smart clipping with Gemini AI (no cut‑off words). ✅ Customizable subtitles + your own banner watermark. ✅ Auto‑translate subtitles to English 🌍. ✅ Files auto‑delete after 3 hours – fully private. ✅ Pay only for what you get: "Hold & Refund" billing. Perfect for creators, SMM, arbitrage, and clipping channels.

products.name: RabbitTravel
products.tagline: Smart travel planning made effortless
products.summaryZh: 智能旅行规划，轻松无忧
products.descriptionZh: RabbitTravel 是一款基于人工智能的旅行规划平台，可为全球任何目的地生成优化行程。它结合智能路线规划、实时交通整合与个性化推荐，帮助用户更快速、更智能地规划旅程。与传统旅行工具不同，RabbitTravel 会根据距离、时间和旅行偏好动态调整行程安排，让复杂的旅行规划变得轻松高效。
products.description: RabbitTravel is an AI-powered travel planning platform that builds optimized itineraries for any destination worldwide. It combines intelligent routing, real-time transit integration, and personalized recommendations to help users plan trips faster and smarter. Unlike traditional travel tools, RabbitTravel dynamically adjusts schedules based on distance, time, and travel preferences, making complex trip planning effortless and highly efficient.

products.name: PromptLayer
products.tagline: Trace AI requests, workflows, and costs in one timeline
products.summaryZh: 在一个时间轴上追踪AI请求、工作流和成本。
products.descriptionZh: PromptLayer 为开发者提供AI可观测性。通过单一时间线和瀑布视图追踪请求、工作流、Token用量、延迟、成本和故障。追踪多步骤AI系统的完整执行路径，了解故障发生位置，识别缓慢或昂贵的工作流步骤，并以开发者对现代软件系统所期望的可见性来调试AI应用。
products.description: PromptLayer is AI observability for developers. Trace requests, workflows, token usage, latency, costs, and failures through a single timeline and waterfall view. Follow complete execution paths across multi-step AI systems, understand where failures occur, identify slow or expensive workflow steps, and debug AI applications with the same visibility developers expect from modern software systems.

products.name: Drafted
products.tagline: Design a home instantly with AI
products.summaryZh: 用AI即刻设计你的家
products.descriptionZh: 设计梦想中的房屋从未如此简单。绘制任意户型，选择房间布局，Drafted 即可在数秒内生成完整的平面图、立面图和 3D 住宅设计。即时探索创意，自定义布局，并在准备推进时导出 CAD 和 PDF 文件。过去一个月，已有超过 12 万人使用该产品，生成了超过 32.5 万套住宅设计。我们的增长主要来自社交媒体的病毒式传播和口碑推荐。
products.description: It’s never been easier to design your dream house. Draw any footprint, choose your rooms, and Drafted generates complete floor plans, elevations, and 3D home designs in seconds. Explore ideas instantly, customize layouts, and export CAD and PDF files when you're ready to move forward. Over the last month, more than 120,000 people have come to the product and generated over 325,000 home designs. Most of our growth has come from viral social sharing and word of mouth.

products.name: Coffee Piano
products.tagline: Browser music and piano studio with visual harmony tools
products.summaryZh: 浏览器音乐与钢琴工作室，配备视觉和声工具
products.descriptionZh: 大多数和声工具要么过于理论化，要么过于简单。Coffee Piano将真实的钢琴工作室、采样钢琴与Rhodes音色、MIDI、延音踏板与可视化和声引擎融为一体。轨道可视化以圆形图谱形式展示音阶与和弦。和声图谱揭示声部进行与和弦功能。可一键对每小节或整个和弦进行重新编配。吉他指板图与每个和弦同步显示。浏览器即可运行，无需安装，双语界面。
products.description: Most harmony tools are too theoretical or too simple. Coffee Piano combines a real piano studio, sampled Piano & Rhodes, MIDI, sustain pedal with a visual harmony engine. Orbit visuals show scales and chords as circular maps. A harmony map reveals voice leading and chord function. Reharmonize in one click per bar or full progression. Guitar diagrams sync to every chord. Works in the browser, no install, bilingual UI.
